name: digital-chip-design-agents
description: Full digital chip design pipeline — 13 domains from architecture through tape-out and firmware. Skills and orchestrators for RTL design, UVM verification, formal verification, logic synthesis, DFT, STA, HLS, physical design, SoC integration, compiler toolchain, embedded firmware, and FPGA emulation.

plugins.name: chip-design-architecture
plugins.description: Microarchitecture exploration, PPA estimation, risk assessment, and sign-off

plugins.name: chip-design-rtl
plugins.description: SystemVerilog RTL design — module planning, coding standards, lint, CDC, synthesis check

plugins.name: chip-design-verification
plugins.description: UVM testbench, test planning, constrained random, coverage closure, regression

plugins.name: chip-design-formal
plugins.description: Formal property verification (FPV) and logical equivalence checking (LEC)

plugins.name: chip-design-synthesis
plugins.description: Logic synthesis — SDC constraints, compile optimization, netlist QC and LEC

plugins.name: chip-design-dft
plugins.description: Design for Test — scan insertion, ATPG, MBIST, JTAG boundary scan

plugins.name: chip-design-sta
plugins.description: Static timing analysis — multi-corner analysis, exception review, ECO guidance

plugins.name: chip-design-hls
plugins.description: High-level synthesis — C/C++ to RTL, directive optimization, co-simulation

plugins.name: chip-design-pd
plugins.description: Physical design — floorplan, placement, CTS, routing, timing/power/area opt, sign-off

plugins.name: chip-design-soc
plugins.description: SoC IP integration — procurement, bus fabric, chip-level simulation

plugins.name: chip-design-compiler
plugins.description: Compiler toolchain — LLVM/GCC backend, assembler, linker, runtime libs for custom ISA

plugins.name: chip-design-firmware
plugins.description: Embedded firmware — BSP, peripheral drivers, RTOS integration, validation

plugins.name: chip-design-fpga
plugins.description: FPGA emulation — ASIC-to-FPGA adaptation, partitioning, bring-up, SW validation
